title: George Royal Academy celebrates 100% pass rate
description: GEORGE NEWS - George Royal Academy is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - George Royal Academy is beaming with pride as the matric class of 2024 celebrates a 100% pass rate.


> Even more impressive, half of the students earned bachelor's passes, unlocking doors to exciting futures.


Principal Hendri Swanepoel calls it "nothing short of a miracle".

"This milestone reflects the dedication of the students, the hard work of the teachers, and the Academy's commitment to empowering young lives.

"Well done, Class of 2024 - your future is bright."

George Royal Academy head girl 2024, Esethu Mgengo, receives her results from the principal, Hendri Swanepoel.

Nayree Pondo breaks out in a smile as she reads her matric results.

The ecstatic teaching staff of George Royal Academy after receiving the news that they achieved a 100% pass rate.

Liyema Mathomana (left) and the principal, Hendri Swanepoel

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
